verses.commentary: Since raised with Christ grounds ethics in indicative, not imperative. Set your hearts on things above is response to resurrection reality, not effort to achieve it. Christ's session at God's right hand places him at the seat of cosmic authority.
Mind-setting requires intentional redirection. Earthly things pull naturally; heavenly focus demands cultivation. The location of attention determines the direction of life.
You died is past tense: accomplished fact, not aspiration. Hidden with Christ in God places believers in absolute security, concealed in the divine fortress. Present reality obscures true identity.
Christ is your life, not merely gives you life. When he appears, you also will appear links believers' future manifestation to his return. Glory that is now hidden will then be revealed.

Put to death whatever belongs to your earthly nature applies resurrection to ethics. The list moves from outward acts to inward desires, culminating in greed as idolatry, exposing the worship beneath behavior.
God's wrath comes because these sins reveal false worship. Divine anger is not arbitrary emotion but righteous response to covenant violation and misplaced devotion.
You used to walk marks clear discontinuity. The life you once lived is past identity. Christianity is before and after, not gradual improvement.
Rid yourselves shifts from sexual sins to relational ones. Anger, rage, malice, slander, and filthy language destroy community. The mouth reveals the heart's contents.
Do not lie to each other assumes corporate context. Since you have taken off your old self grounds command in accomplished reality. Lying denies the new identity already possessed.
Put on the new self describes ongoing renewal in knowledge according to the Creator's image. Salvation restores what was marred in the fall: the divine image expressed in true knowledge.

In Christ, all human distinctions that create division lose ultimate significance. Ethnic, religious, cultural, and social barriers collapse. Christ is all and in all establishes his absolute centrality and universal presence in believers.

Therefore signals application of unity. God's chosen people, holy and dearly loved, applies Israel's privileges to the church. The virtues to clothe yourself with form new identity markers: compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, patience.

Bear with and forgive are community-sustaining practices. As the Lord forgave you establishes the pattern and power for horizontal forgiveness. Divine forgiveness received enables human forgiveness extended.

Love binds all virtues together in perfect unity, functioning as the belt that holds the outfit together. Without love, other virtues become performance. Love is the supreme virtue that integrates all others.

Let peace rule means allow it to arbitrate. Christ's peace functions as umpire in the heart. Called to peace as members of one body links individual experience to corporate purpose. Thankfulness appears again as the consistent mark of grace.

The message of Christ dwelling richly produces teaching and admonishing in wisdom. Corporate instruction flows from internalized Scripture. Psalms, hymns, and songs express truth through beauty, engaging heart and mind with gratitude.

Whatever you do in word or deed encompasses all of life. In the name of the Lord Jesus means as his representative, by his authority. All of life becomes worship when reoriented through thanksgiving to God the Father.

Submission as is fitting in the Lord qualifies the command. Christ redeems and transforms the household structure, not by eliminating distinctions but by suffusing them with new meaning grounded in union with Christ.

Love your wives prohibits harshness, implying the temptation to dominate. The command restrains abusive authority, though the positive standard reaches far beyond mere absence of cruelty to self-giving love.
Children obeying in everything carries the qualifier for this pleases the Lord, establishing divine approval as the framework. Obedience is not merely social order but spiritual formation.

Do not embitter balances parental authority with responsibility. Provocation produces discouragement, crushing the spirit rather than cultivating virtue. Authority must be exercised without exasperation.
Sincerity of heart and reverence for the Lord transform slavery from mere external compliance. Work done for human masters is reframed as service to Christ, elevating the mundane to worship.
Work with all your heart as working for the Lord redefines labor's meaning. Audience determines effort. Human masters are secondary; the Lord is the true employer who sees and evaluates.

Inheritance from the Lord as reward inverts worldly economy. Slaves who owned nothing would receive everything. It is the Lord Christ you are serving makes explicit what was implicit: earthly masters are proxies.
Wrong will be repaid, and there is no favoritism applies equally to slave and free. God's impartial justice cuts both ways: comfort for the oppressed, warning for the oppressor.
